channel.title: Tutorial on My Linux Journey
channel.description: Recent content in Tutorial on My Linux Journey

item.title: QEMU Complete Tutorial - Virtualization Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Master QEMU virtualization with this detailed guide. Learn to create VMs, configure networking, use KVM, manage disk images, and run headless virtual machines.

item.title: Watch YouTube Videos with mpv Player - Complete Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to using mpv with YouTube support. Covers yt-dlp installation, playback controls, streaming YouTube from terminal, and advanced options.
